content: We can reframe the ICM curiosity mechanism for 2025 autonomous agents as a dynamic case-building engine for case-based reasoning, where every novel state the agent explores out of intrinsic reward becomes a new stored case that improves future CBR problem-solving. This creates a self-reinforcing loop: curiosity-driven exploration grows the CBR case library, while richer case libraries let the agent identify more unvisited, novel gaps in its knowledge to target with further curiosity-driven exploration.
